mapper.select: select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.post_type, u.nickname, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.region, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.is_deleted from posts p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where is_deleted = false order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into posts ( user_id, post_type, title, content, category, region, view_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{postType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{region}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, now(), now(), 0 )
mapper.select: select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.post_type, u.nickname, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.region, p.view_count, p.comment_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.is_deleted from posts p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into comments ( post_id, user_id, content, created_at ) values ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, now() )
mapper.select: select c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at from comments c where c.post_id = #{postId} order by c.created_at desc
